_comment: Talking-Video spec template. Replace all CHANGEME values. See references/talking-video.md for the full schema.

common._about_api_key: Leave empty to read from ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env var (recommended). Never commit a real key.

concepts._template_for: Hook family 1 — Deception. Pattern: 'I used [app] for [high stakes] and [surprising outcome]'.
concepts.name: 01_deception_example
concepts.vo_text: Help, I used MyApp for [HIGH STAKES SITUATION] and [SURPRISING POSITIVE OUTCOME]. I uploaded one [HUMBLE INPUT] into the app. It gave me [POLISHED RESULT] that looks like I spent [EXPENSIVE ALTERNATIVE]. [SOCIAL PROOF MOMENT]. Nobody knew. Nobody asked. I'm a little terrified. MyApp. On the App Store.

concepts._template_for: Hook family 2 — Identity Dream. Pattern: 'I never had [X] until [app]'.
concepts.name: 02_dream_example
concepts.vo_text: I never had [DESIRED THING] until MyApp. I don't [HAVE PRIVILEGED ACCESS]. I tried this instead. It gave me [BEAUTIFUL RESULT]. I just sat with it. MyApp. On the App Store.
